---
title: "Height shows no clear association with self-serving beliefs about wealth redistribution: A commentary on Richardson (2020)"
authors: "Jones, A. L."
year: 2021
date: 2021-01-01
pub-journal: "Evolution and Human Behaviour"
volume: "42"
pages: "593–596"
doi: "10.1016/j.evolhumbehav.2021.09.002"
pdf: "assets/papers/2021/Jones_commentary_2021.pdf"
categories: [methodology, bayesian]
---
